languages.text: "Да-да, шерин, ты, как всегда, права..." {n}Джай ловит ваш взгляд и добавляет шепотом.{/n} "Но я предпочту выживание".

traits.locale_text: "Да-да, шерин, ты, как всегда, права..." {n}Джай ловит ваш взгляд и добавляет шепотом.{/n} "Но я предпочту выживание".
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

languages.text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."
languages.original_text: "Да-да, шерин, ты, как всегда, права..." {n}Джай ловит ваш взгляд и добавляет шепотом.{/n} "Но я предпочту выживание".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I shall choose survival, thank you."
"Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I shall choose survival, thank you."
"Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I shall choose survival, thank you."
"Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I shall choose survival, thank you."
"Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

languages.text: «Sí, shereen, como siempre, tiene razón...». {n}Jae te llama la atención con la mirada y susurra.{/n} «Sin embargo, yo también elijo sobrevivir, gracias».
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, shereen, como siempre, tiene razón...». {n}Jae te llama la atención con la mirada y susurra.{/n} «Sin embargo, yo también elijo sobrevivir, gracias».

languages.text: “是啊，是啊，亲爱的，你说得对，一如既往……”{n}婕伊迎着你的目光，压低声音补了一句。{/n}“不过，我还是选择活命，多谢你的好意。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

traits.locale_text: “是啊，是啊，亲爱的，你说得对，一如既往……”{n}婕伊迎着你的目光，压低声音补了一句。{/n}“不过，我还是选择活命，多谢你的好意。”

languages.text: « Oui, oui, shereen, vous avez raison, comme toujours... » {n}Jae intercepte votre regard et ajoute dans un murmure :{/n} « Mais moi, je choisirai tout de même la survie, merci bien. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, oui, shereen, vous avez raison, comme toujours... » {n}Jae intercepte votre regard et ajoute dans un murmure :{/n} « Mais moi, je choisirai tout de même la survie, merci bien. »

languages.text: "Evet şirinim, her zamanki gibi haklısın..." {n}Jae, bakışlarını yakalıyor ve fısıldayarak ekliyor.{/n} "Fakat ben hayatta kalmayı seçeceğim, teşekkür ederim."
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

traits.locale_text: "Evet şirinim, her zamanki gibi haklısın..." {n}Jae, bakışlarını yakalıyor ve fısıldayarak ekliyor.{/n} "Fakat ben hayatta kalmayı seçeceğim, teşekkür ederim."

languages.text: "Ja, ja, Shereen, Ihr habt recht, wie immer ..." {n}Als Jae deinen Blick bemerkt, fügt sie flüsternd hinzu:{/n} "Aber ich entscheide mich für das Überleben, danke."
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ja, Shereen, Ihr habt recht, wie immer ..." {n}Als Jae deinen Blick bemerkt, fügt sie flüsternd hinzu:{/n} "Aber ich entscheide mich für das Überleben, danke."

languages.text: 「ええ、ええ、シェリーン、あなたはいつも通り、正しいわ…」{n}ジェイはあなたの視線を捉え、ささやくように付け加えた。{/n}「でも、私は生存を選ぶわ、ありがとう。」
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、ええ、シェリーン、あなたはいつも通り、正しいわ…」{n}ジェイはあなたの視線を捉え、ささやくように付け加えた。{/n}「でも、私は生存を選ぶわ、ありがとう。」
